text: Here's what science actually says about cholesterol nuance. Cholesterol isn’t just ‘good’ or ‘bad’. It’s complex and essential for life. Recent studies show different cholesterol types play unique roles. But it’s not black and white. For instance, HDL cholesterol can actually protect your heart, while LDL isn’t always harmful. Understanding the nuance helps us make better health choices. This science is evolving. Interested in more science insights? Hit that follow button!
